title: Bloodthirsty
description: A Thriller to tear your heart and bring you nitghtmares. A Bloody Horror Modpack.
body:
# 🩸 Bloodthirsty – A Horror Survival Modpack Bloodthirsty is a carefully curated horror-themed modpack designed to immerse players in a chilling survival experience. With a blend of cryptid legends, psychological horror, and dimension-hopping threats, this pack transforms Minecraft into a suspenseful thriller. 🧟 What’s Inside: 👻 Terrifying Entities: Encounter Siren Head, Herobrine, Sasquatch, The Knocker, Billy, and more 🌫️ Atmospheric Horror: Mods like From the Fog, Dark Mist Dweller, and Face of Horror create eerie environments and unpredictable encounters 🕳️ Dimensional Intrusion: Mods like Another Dimension-Invasion and From Another World bring hostile forces from beyond 🧠 Psychological Threats: King Hacker, Player From Another Server, and Invalid Entity blur the line between reality and nightmare 🧱 Performance & Visuals: Entity Culling, Geckolib, AzureLib, and Lodestone ensure smooth gameplay and enhanced animations ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 🎮 Gameplay Style: Survival-focused with horror immersion No overpowered gear — tension builds naturally Ideal for solo play or small multiplayer sessions Balanced for 1.20.1 Forge - 📦 Included Mods: - Another Dimension-Invasion - Geckolib - King Hacker – Creepypasta - Cave Dweller Reborn & Better Cave Dweller - From Another World - Horror Cryptid: Sasquatch - Lodestone - True Herobrine - Siren Head: Java Edition - Billy – The Horrors Unleashed - Entity Culling - The Knocker - Face of Horror - From the Fog - From the Depths - FromAnotherLibrary - Player From Another Server - Invalid Entity - From Another Dimension: Ghosts - Dark Mist Dweller - AzureLib **🧠 Why Download?** If you’re looking for a modpack that turns Minecraft into a horror survival experience — without sacrificing performance or playability — Bloodthirsty delivers. It’s built for thrill-seekers, lore lovers, and anyone who wants to feel hunted in the dark. ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **Try Out my other Modpacks and More!!! [Coming More Soon!!]** -
Craft Reversal
[A datapack that lets you uncraft Items that you crafted by mistake and take back you'r valuables.] -
Green's Better MC
[A Modpack that will improve your world and experience and add tonnes of new biomes, features, mobs and optimization.] -
Bloodthirsty
[A Thriller to tear your heart and bring you nitghtmares. A Bloody Horror Modpack.] -
